rules: Do not build paid, Luna, affiliate, or priority offer experiments until weekly review and lead demand gates are open.
Real lead demand requires explicit reply consent, traceable proof, and repeated same-guardian demand.
Public free keepsakes and content variants can remain available, but they are not proof of purchase intent.
Owned PDFs, wallpapers, email templates, and short rituals remain blocked until a real matching request exists.
Offer queue rows must remain blocked while empty data mode or weekly review blockers are active.

handoffRows.owner_action: Start lead and offer evaluation only after publish/KPI handoff opens weekly review.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Do not evaluate lead or offer routes while post URLs or minimum KPI proof are incomplete.

handoffRows.owner_action: Confirm weekly review, week decision gate, and non-empty data mode before route decisions.
handoffRows.evidence_required: weekly review ready=1, weeklyDecision gate=1, emptyDataMode=0.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Do not pick winners or change commerce order while empty data mode is true.

handoffRows.owner_action: Complete weekly evidence checks before choosing content, asset, Luna, or affiliate direction.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Stop if any weekly decision evidence row remains pending.

handoffRows.owner_action: Keep Contact, keepsake, and Luna requests importable before using them as lead signals.
handoffRows.evidence_required: lead ops action sheet has ready capture checks and lead magnet inventory issues=0.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Do not collect raw sensitive content or use requests without explicit reply consent.

handoffRows.owner_action: Advance to owned assets or Luna only after repeated same-guardian demand creates a ready route.
handoffRows.evidence_required: lead-demand-gate readyRoutes >= 1 with traceable evidence and explicit consent.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Do not create paid or priority assets from a single request, weak signal, or no consent.

handoffRows.owner_action: Prepare only the smallest matching free asset or Luna aftercare item for proven demand.
handoffRows.evidence_required: asset-fulfillment-gate has at least one ready demand pair or ready offer asset.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Keep public free assets available, but do not build custom products before demand proof.

handoffRows.owner_action: Only run low-risk offer experiments when both plan and queue have READY rows.
handoffRows.evidence_required: offer-experiment-plan and offer-experiment-queue both have at least one READY row.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Do not add paid CTA to Shorts or claim diagnosis, therapy, guarantee, or required purchase.

handoffRows.owner_action: Keep five public free assets as safe lead magnets while real demand is absent.
handoffRows.evidence_required: asset-fulfillment-gate publicFreeReady >= 5 and lead-demand-gate has no repeated route.
handoffRows.stop_condition: Stop if public free assets are treated as proof of product demand without tracked requests.

leadActions.owner_action: Run lead form and importability audits before treating Contact or keepsake requests as structured leads.
leadActions.evidence_required: configured/rendered forms and importable sample texts must report issues=0.

leadActions.owner_action: For each real Contact or keepsake email, copy only the LoveTypes structured request block into a temporary text file.
leadActions.evidence_required: source, guardian, intake_type, reply email presence, consent and utm_content parsing all visible in check output.

leadActions.owner_action: Write back only real requests with explicit reply consent and a traceable proof note; never store raw email in the CSV.
leadActions.command: python3 tools/promotion_lead_text_import.py add --input /path/to/request.txt --proof-note "email thread Gmail request checked 2026-06-14"
leadActions.evidence_required: lead-intake-tracker.csv gains one real row, and matched utm_content increments the mapped KPI field.

leadActions.owner_action: Refresh evidence and demand gates before deciding whether to build a free asset, Luna pack, or offer experiment.
leadActions.evidence_required: real leads have traceable evidence and explicit consent; repeated guardian demand reaches the threshold before any offer build.

leadActions.owner_action: If structured text parsing fails, use guardian-specific command examples from lead-writeback-playbook.md after manual validation.
leadActions.command: python3 tools/promotion_lead_writeback.py add --source contact --guardian <guardian> --intake-type <type> --consent-status explicit_reply_ok --proof-note "email thread checked YYYY-MM-DD"
leadActions.evidence_required: manual command still requires explicit consent, safe scope and proof note policy.

leadActions.owner_action: Use the demand gate state as the only source for asset or offer priority.

safeAssetsNow.evidence: Existing keepsake story card and practice-card route are present across all languages.
safeAssetsNow.stopCondition: Do not treat saves/downloads as demand until tracked externally.
safeAssetsNow.safetyBoundary: 不承諾療效，不替代諮商，不把短影片 CTA 改成直接購買。
